name: void-dominion-mobile
description: Capacitor Android wrapper that packages the Void Dominion prototype (a self-contained HTML game) into an installable APK. Standalone — not part of the pnpm workspace.

scripts.apk: npm run www && npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon

comments.overrides: Pin the transitive node-tar to a patched line (>=7.5.16) to clear the GHSA path-traversal / symlink / file-smuggling advisories that affect tar <=7.5.15. @capacitor/cli@6 declares tar ^6.1.11 but its only use is tar.extract({file,cwd}) (build-time template extraction), which is API-compatible with tar 7 — so we keep Capacitor 6 (the v6/JDK17 APK pipeline) instead of the breaking @capacitor/cli@8 bump.
